scripts.name: Door
scripts.source:
local Door = {}
Door.__index = Door

function Door.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, Door)
    config = config or {}

    self.closeTime = config.closeTime or 5

    return self
end

function Door:Awake()
    -- private AudioSource source { get { return GetComponent<AudioSource>(); } }
    self.source = self:GetComponent("AudioSource")

    -- private Animator doorAnim { get { return transform.parent.Find("door").GetComponent<Animator>(); } }
    -- Resolve the sibling "door" object; Animator params degrade to Attributes on it.
    local parent = self.gameObject.Parent
    self.doorObj = parent and parent:FindFirstChild("door")

    -- OnTriggerEnter / OnTriggerExit -> contract touch signal (gameObject may be a Model).
    self.host:connectGameObjectSignal(self.gameObject, "Touched", function(other)
        -- if (other.tag == "Player")
        local plr = self.host.playerFromTouch(other)
        if not plr then return end
        -- if (other.GetComponent<Player>().hasKey): read the canonical shared flag.
        if plr:GetAttribute("hasKey") then
            self:ToggleDoor(true)
        end
    end)

    self.host:connectGameObjectSignal(self.gameObject, "TouchEnded", function(other)
        local plr = self.host.playerFromTouch(other)
        if not plr then return end
        if plr:GetAttribute("hasKey") then
            self:ToggleDoor(false)
        end
    end)
end

function Door:ToggleDoor(value)
    -- doorAnim.SetBool("open", value): Animator param -> inert Attribute mirror.
    if self.doorObj then
        self.doorObj:SetAttribute("open", value)
    end

    -- source.pitch = Random.Range(0.8f, 1.2f)
    if self.source then
        self.source.PlaybackSpeed = math.random() * 0.4 + 0.8
        self.source:Play()
    end
end

return Door

local GameManager = {}
GameManager.__index = GameManager

function GameManager.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, GameManager)
    return self
end

function GameManager:Awake()
    local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")
    UserInputService.MouseIconEnabled = false
    UserInputService.MouseBehavior = Enum.MouseBehavior.LockCenter
end

function GameManager:RestartGame(time)
    self.host.startCoroutine(self, function()
        self:RestartTimer(time)
    end)
end

function GameManager:RestartTimer(time)
    task.wait(time)
    -- UNCONVERTED: SceneManager.LoadScene(0) — Roblox has no scene-loading API; a full scene reload has no faithful runtime translation.
end

return GameManager

scripts.name: HostilePlane
scripts.source:
local Player = require(game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage"):FindFirstChild("Player", true) or game:GetService("ServerStorage"):FindFirstChild("Player", true))

local STUDS_PER_METER = 3.571

local HostilePlane = {}
HostilePlane.__index = HostilePlane

function HostilePlane.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, HostilePlane)
    config = config or {}

    -- [Range(3f, 10f)] shootTimer, default 5.
    self.shootTimer = config.shootTimer or 5

    -- Object variables.
    self.target = nil

    return self
end

-- private AudioSource source { get { return GetComponent<AudioSource>(); } }
-- Side-effecting getter -> accessor method (re-resolved on every access).
function HostilePlane:getSource()
    return self:GetComponent("AudioSource")
end

-- private Transform origin { get { return transform.Find("Origin"); } }
function HostilePlane:getOrigin()
    return self.gameObject:FindFirstChild("Origin")
end

function HostilePlane:Start()
    -- target = Player.instance.transform (Player.instance is the player gameObject;
    -- a Transform aliases its gameObject in Roblox).
    self.target = Player.instance
    self.host.startCoroutine(self, function()
        self:TimedShooting()
    end)
end

function HostilePlane:FixedUpdate(dt)
    if self.target ~= nil then
        local origin = self:getOrigin()
        if origin then
            -- origin.LookAt(target.position + Vector3.up * 2): aim slightly above
            -- the target. The 2m offset is converted to studs.
            local targetPos = origin:GetPivot().Position
            if self.target.GetPivot then
                targetPos = self.target:GetPivot().Position
            end
            local lookPoint = targetPos + Vector3.new(0, 2 * STUDS_PER_METER, 0)
            origin:PivotTo(CFrame.lookAt(origin:GetPivot().Position, lookPoint))
        end
    end
end

function HostilePlane:TimedShooting()
    while self.target ~= nil do
        task.wait(self.shootTimer)
        local origin = self:getOrigin()
        if origin then
            -- Instantiate(ammoPrefab, origin.position, origin.rotation).
            self.host.instantiatePrefab(self.ammoPrefab, workspace, origin:GetPivot())
        end
        local source = self:getSource()
        if source then
            -- source.pitch = Random.Range(0.8f, 1.2f) (float).
            source.PlaybackSpeed = math.random() * (1.2 - 0.8) + 0.8
            -- source.PlayOneShot(shootSound).
            if self.shootSound then
                source.SoundId = self.shootSound
                source:Play()
            end
            source.PlaybackSpeed = 1
        end
    end
end

return HostilePlane

scripts.name: HudControl
scripts.source:
local Player = require(game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage"):FindFirstChild("Player", true) or game:GetService("ServerStorage"):FindFirstChild("Player", true))

local HudControl = {}
HudControl.__index = HudControl

function HudControl.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, HudControl)
    config = config or {}

    -- Assignment Variables: AudioMixerSnapshots have no Roblox equivalent.
    -- Injected on self by name if serialized; default nil.
    self.normal = nil
    self.muted = nil

    -- Cached UI references (resolved in Awake; the host surface / gameObject
    -- is not bound until after new() returns).
    self.module = nil
    self.itemModule = nil
    self.ammo = nil
    self.pauseMenu = nil
    self.ammoCur = nil
    self.health = nil

    -- Stored event connections for teardown.
    self._conns = {}

    return self
end

-- Find-or-create the canonical BindableEvent in ReplicatedStorage so this HUD
-- and the Player script share the same instance regardless of lifecycle order.
function HudControl:_ensureEvent(name)
    local rs = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
    local existing = rs:FindFirstChild(name)
    if existing then return existing end
    local b = Instance.new("BindableEvent")
    b.Name = name
    b.Parent = rs
    return b
end

function HudControl:Awake()
    local go = self.gameObject

    -- Reference Variables (C# property getters -> cached child lookups).
    self.module = go:FindFirstChild("Module")
    self.itemModule = go:FindFirstChild("ItemModule")
    self.pauseMenu = go:FindFirstChild("Pause")
    self.ammo = self.module and self.module:FindFirstChild("Ammo")
    self.ammoCur = self.ammo and self.ammo:FindFirstChild("Cur")
    self.health = self.module and self.module:FindFirstChild("Health")

    -- ammo.Find("Total").GetComponent<Text>().text = Player.maxAmmo.ToString()
    if self.ammo then
        local total = self.ammo:FindFirstChild("Total")
        if total then total.Text = tostring(Player.maxAmmo) end
    end

    -- Player.HealthUpdate += UpdatePlayerHealth, etc. The static events live in
    -- ReplicatedStorage as BindableEvents.
    local healthEvt = self:_ensureEvent("HealthUpdate")
    table.insert(self._conns, healthEvt.Event:Connect(function(curHealth)
        self:UpdatePlayerHealth(curHealth)
    end))

    local ammoEvt = self:_ensureEvent("AmmoUpdate")
    table.insert(self._conns, ammoEvt.Event:Connect(function(curAmmo)
        self:UpdatePlayerAmmo(curAmmo)
    end))

    local itemEvt = self:_ensureEvent("ItemUpdate")
    table.insert(self._conns, itemEvt.Event:Connect(function(itemName)
        self:UpdatePlayerItems(itemName)
    end))

    local pauseEvt = self:_ensureEvent("PauseEvent")
    table.insert(self._conns, pauseEvt.Event:Connect(function(pause)
        self:PauseMenu(pause)
    end))
end

function HudControl:PauseMenu(pause)
    if pause then
        -- Time.timeScale = 0: Roblox has no global timescale control; pause is
        -- surfaced via the menu visibility below. UNCONVERTED: global timescale.
        -- muted.TransitionTo(0): AudioMixerSnapshot has no Roblox equivalent.
    else
        -- Time.timeScale = 1: see above.
        -- normal.TransitionTo(0): AudioMixerSnapshot has no Roblox equivalent.
    end
    if self.pauseMenu then
        self.host.setActive(self.pauseMenu, pause)
    end
end

function HudControl:UpdatePlayerItems(itemName)
    -- itemModule.Find(itemName).GetComponent<Toggle>().isOn = true. Roblox UI has
    -- no Toggle; record the on-state via an Attribute (inert degradation).
    if self.itemModule and itemName then
        local toggle = self.itemModule:FindFirstChild(itemName)
        if toggle then toggle:SetAttribute("isOn", true) end
    end
end

function HudControl:UpdatePlayerAmmo(curAmmo)
    if self.ammoCur then
        self.ammoCur.Text = tostring(curAmmo)
    end
end

function HudControl:UpdatePlayerHealth(curHealth)
    local percentage = curHealth / Player.maxHealth
    -- health.value = percentage. Roblox has no Slider; surface the normalized
    -- value via an Attribute (inert degradation).
    if self.health then
        self.health:SetAttribute("Value", percentage)
    end
end

function HudControl:OnDestroy()
    for _, conn in self._conns do
        conn:Disconnect()
    end
    self._conns = {}
end

return HudControl

scripts.name: Machine
scripts.source:
local Machine = {}
Machine.__index = Machine

local Player = require(game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage"):FindFirstChild("Player", true) or game:GetService("ServerStorage"):FindFirstChild("Player", true))

-- Returns a CFrame for any PVInstance reference (BasePart or Model), or identity.
local function pivotOf(obj)
    if not obj then return CFrame.new() end
    if obj.GetPivot then return obj:GetPivot() end
    return CFrame.new()
end

function Machine.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, Machine)
    config = config or {}

    -- Object variables (Unity-style 0-based `activated` counter preserved so the
    -- SetInteger value and the `activated == 3` comparison stay faithful; table
    -- indices add +1 at the use site).
    self.items = {}          -- Transform[4], filled in Awake via Find
    -- itemNames[i] = itemPrefabs[i].name in Unity; a prefab_id string does not
    -- expose its source prefab's name, so the host injects parallel scalar names
    -- via config.itemNames when available.
    self.itemNames = config.itemNames or {}
    self.itemPlaced = {false, false, false}  -- bool[3]
    self.activated = 0

    return self
end

function Machine:Awake()
    -- transform.Find("Item " + (i+1)) for the 4 slot transforms.
    for i = 0, 3 do
        self.items[i + 1] = self.gameObject and self.gameObject:FindFirstChild("Item " .. (i + 1))
        if i < 3 and self.itemNames[i + 1] == nil then
            -- itemPrefabs[i].name: a prefab_id has no readable source name; fall
            -- back to the raw prefab_id when config didn't supply a name.
            self.itemNames[i + 1] = self.itemPrefabs and self.itemPrefabs[i + 1]
        end
    end

    -- OnTriggerEnter(Collider other) -> contract-compliant touch subscription.
    self.host:connectGameObjectSignal(self.gameObject, "Touched", function(other)
        -- other.tag == "Player": resolve the owning Player from the raw touch part.
        local plr = self.host.playerFromTouch(other)
        if not plr then return end
        local char = plr.Character

        -- Unity read player.hasItems.Contains(itemNames[i]); cross-script the
        -- canonical store is the `has<Item>` Attribute that Player mirrors on the
        -- character / Player instance, so read that instead of the peer component.
        for i = 0, 2 do
            local itemName = self.itemNames[i + 1]
            if itemName and itemName ~= "" then
                local flag = "has" .. (tostring(itemName):gsub("[^%w_]+", "_"))
                local has = (char and char:GetAttribute(flag)) or plr:GetAttribute(flag)
                if has then
                    self:PlaceItem(i)
                end
            end
        end
    end)
end

function Machine:PlaceItem(number)
    if not self.itemPlaced[number + 1] then
        local slot = self.items[self.activated + 1]
        local cf = pivotOf(slot)

        -- Instantiate(itemPrefabs[number], items[activated].position/rotation),
        -- parented to that slot (the C# SetParent(items[activated++])).
        local item = self.host.instantiatePrefab(self.itemPrefabs[number + 1], slot, cf)
        if item and item.PivotTo then item:PivotTo(cf) end

        -- items[activated++]: increment after using the current slot.
        self.activated = self.activated + 1
        self.itemPlaced[number + 1] = true

        -- doors[number].SendMessage("ToggleDoor", true, DontRequireReceiver).
        -- Roblox has no name-dispatch; mirror the request as an Attribute on the
        -- door instance (the canonical cross-script channel) for the Door script.
        if number < 2 then
            local door = self.doors and self.doors[number + 1]
            if door then door:SetAttribute("ToggleDoor", true) end
        end

        -- planeHolder.SetInteger("actionNumber", activated): Animator params
        -- degrade to inert Attributes.
        if self.planeHolder then
            self.planeHolder:SetAttribute("actionNumber", self.activated)
        end

        -- Final reward spawn when all three slots are filled.
        if self.activated == 3 then
            local lastSlot = self.items[self.activated + 1]
            self.host.instantiatePrefab(
                self.itemPrefabs[self.activated + 1],
                workspace,
                CFrame.new(pivotOf(lastSlot).Position)
            )
        end
    end
end

return Machine

scripts.name: Menu
scripts.source:
local Menu = {}
Menu.__index = Menu

function Menu.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, Menu)
    self.startable = false
    return self
end

function Menu:Awake()
    local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")
    UserInputService.MouseIconEnabled = true
    UserInputService.MouseBehavior = Enum.MouseBehavior.Default
end

function Menu:source()
    return self:GetComponent("AudioSource")
end

function Menu:Update(dt)
    if self.startable then
        local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")
        if UserInputService:IsMouseButtonPressed(Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1) then
            self:StartGame()
        end
    end
end

function Menu:StartGame()
    -- UNCONVERTED: SceneManager.LoadScene(1) — Roblox has no multi-scene loader; scene transitions are not supported.
end

function Menu:ToControls()
    local controls = self.gameObject:FindFirstChild("Controls")
    if controls then
        self.host.setActive(controls, true)
    end
    local sound = self:source()
    if sound then
        sound:Play()
    end
    self.startable = true
end

function Menu:QuitGame()
    -- UNCONVERTED: Application.Quit() — Roblox clients cannot terminate the application from a script.
end

return Menu

scripts.name: Mine
scripts.source:
local Mine = {}
Mine.__index = Mine

local STUDS_PER_METER = 3.571

function Mine.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, Mine)
    self.explodeTime = config.explodeTime or 1
    self.damage = config.damage or 10
    return self
end

function Mine:Awake()
    self.host:connectGameObjectSignal(self.gameObject, "Touched", function(other)
        local plr = self.host.playerFromTouch(other)
        if not plr then return end
        local sound = self:GetComponent("AudioSource")
        if sound then sound:Play() end
        self.host.invoke(self, "Explode", self.explodeTime)
    end)
end

function Mine:Explode()
    local pos = self.gameObject:GetPivot().Position
    self.host.instantiatePrefab(self.explosion, workspace, CFrame.new(pos))

    local cols = workspace:GetPartBoundsInRadius(pos, 2 * STUDS_PER_METER)
    local damaged = {}
    for _, col in cols do
        local plr = self.host.playerFromTouch(col)
        if plr and not damaged[plr] then
            damaged[plr] = true
            local char = plr.Character
            local humanoid = char and char:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
            if humanoid then
                humanoid:TakeDamage(self.damage)
            end
        end
    end

    self.host.destroy(self.gameObject)
end

return Mine

scripts.name: Pickup
scripts.source:
local STUDS_PER_METER = 3.571

local Pickup = {}
Pickup.__index = Pickup

function Pickup.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, Pickup)
    self.itemName = config.itemName or ""
    self.rotationSpeed = config.rotationSpeed or 100
    self.downVector = nil
    self.upVector = nil
    return self
end

function Pickup:getSource()
    return self:GetComponent("AudioSource")
end

function Pickup:Awake()
    local pos = self.gameObject:GetPivot().Position
    self.downVector = pos - Vector3.new(0, 0.5 * STUDS_PER_METER, 0)
    self.upVector = pos

    self.host:connectGameObjectSignal(self.gameObject, "Touched", function(other)
        local plr = self.host.playerFromTouch(other)
        if not plr then return end

        local playerComp = self.host.findObjectOfType("Player")
        if playerComp then
            playerComp:GetItem(self.itemName)
        end

        self.host.destroy(self.gameObject)
    end)

    self.host.startCoroutine(self, function()
        self:MoveDown()
    end)
end

function Pickup:Update(dt)
    self.gameObject:PivotTo(self.gameObject:GetPivot() * CFrame.Angles(0, math.rad(dt * self.rotationSpeed), 0))
end

function Pickup:MoveDown()
    while self.gameObject:GetPivot().Position.Y > self.downVector.Y + 0.05 * STUDS_PER_METER do
        local dt = task.wait()
        self.gameObject:PivotTo(self.gameObject:GetPivot() + Vector3.new(0, -0.5 * STUDS_PER_METER * dt, 0))
    end

    self.host.startCoroutine(self, function()
        self:MoveUp()
    end)
end

function Pickup:MoveUp()
    while self.gameObject:GetPivot().Position.Y < self.upVector.Y - 0.05 * STUDS_PER_METER do
        local dt = task.wait()
        self.gameObject:PivotTo(self.gameObject:GetPivot() + Vector3.new(0, 0.5 * STUDS_PER_METER * dt, 0))
    end

    self.host.startCoroutine(self, function()
        self:MoveDown()
    end)
end

return Pickup

scripts.name: Plane
scripts.source:
local Plane = {}
Plane.__index = Plane

function Plane.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, Plane)
    return self
end

function Plane:Awake()
    -- OnTriggerEnter(other): host:connectGameObjectSignal covers trigger + collision.
    -- self.gameObject may be a Model, so never touch self.gameObject.Touched directly.
    self.host:connectGameObjectSignal(self.gameObject, "Touched", function(other)
        -- other.CompareTag("Player"): normalize the raw touched part to the owning Player.
        local plr = self.host.playerFromTouch(other)
        if not plr then return end

        -- player.hasItems.Exists(x => x.Equals("GasCan")): the Player script mirrors
        -- picked-up items as canonical ``has<Item>`` Attributes, so read ``hasGasCan``.
        if plr:GetAttribute("hasGasCan") then
            -- Instantiate(flyingPlane); plane.transform.SetParent(transform.parent).
            -- flyingPlane is the injected serialized prefab_id; parent under this
            -- GameObject's parent. Spawn at this trigger's pivot.
            local parent = self.gameObject.Parent
            local plane = self.host.instantiatePrefab(self.flyingPlane, parent, self.gameObject:GetPivot())

            -- FindAnyObjectByType<GameManager>().SendMessage("RestartGame", 5).
            local gm = self.host.findObjectOfType("GameManager")
            if gm then gm:RestartGame(5) end

            -- Destroy(player.gameObject): tear down the player's character model.
            self.host.destroy(plr.Character)

            -- cutsceneCamera.GetComponent<Camera>().enabled = true;
            -- cutsceneCamera.GetComponent<AudioListener>().enabled = true;
            -- UNCONVERTED: Roblox uses a single workspace.CurrentCamera and has no
            -- per-object AudioListener component, so swapping to a scene camera
            -- GameObject has no faithful runtime translation.

            -- Destroy(gameObject).
            self.host.destroy(self.gameObject)
        end
    end)
end

return Plane

scripts.name: PlaneBullet
scripts.source:
local STUDS_PER_METER = 3.571

local PlaneBullet = {}
PlaneBullet.__index = PlaneBullet

function PlaneBullet.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, PlaneBullet)
    self.fadeTime = config.fadeTime or 6
    self.force = config.force or 200
    self.damage = config.damage or 10
    self.exploded = false
    return self
end

function PlaneBullet:Awake()
    self.host:connectGameObjectSignal(self.gameObject, "Touched", function(other)
        if self.exploded then return end
        self.exploded = true

        local pos = self.gameObject:GetPivot().Position
        if self.explosion then
            self.host.instantiatePrefab(self.explosion, workspace, CFrame.new(pos))
        end

        local cols = workspace:GetPartBoundsInRadius(pos, 2 * STUDS_PER_METER)
        for _, col in cols do
            local plr = self.host.playerFromTouch(col)
            if plr and plr.Character then
                local humanoid = plr.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
                if humanoid then
                    humanoid:TakeDamage(self.damage)
                end
            end
        end

        self.host.destroy(self.gameObject)
    end)
end

function PlaneBullet:Start()
    local rb = self:GetComponent("Rigidbody")
    if rb then
        local impulse = self.gameObject:GetPivot().LookVector * self.force
        rb:ApplyImpulse(impulse)
    end
    task.delay(self.fadeTime, function()
        self.host.destroy(self.gameObject)
    end)
end

return PlaneBullet

scripts.name: Player
scripts.source:
local Player = {}
Player.__index = Player

local _maxHealth = 100
local _maxAmmo = 250
local STUDS_PER_METER = 3.571

-- Static read-only accessors (Player.maxHealth / Player.maxAmmo)
Player.maxHealth = _maxHealth
Player.maxAmmo = _maxAmmo

-- Returns a CFrame for any PVInstance reference (BasePart or Model), or identity.
local function pivotOf(obj)
    if not obj then return CFrame.new() end
    if obj.GetPivot then return obj:GetPivot() end
    return CFrame.new()
end

function Player.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, Player)
    config = config or {}

    -- Customizeable scalar fields (defaults mirror the Unity Inspector values).
    self.speed = config.speed or 6
    self.jumpSpeed = config.jumpSpeed or 1.5
    self.gravity = config.gravity or 0.5
    self.shootRange = config.shootRange or 100
    self.minAngle = config.minAngle or -30
    self.maxAngle = config.maxAngle or 45
    self.sensitivity = config.sensitivity or 200
    self.healAmount = config.healAmount or 25
    self.ammoAmount = config.ammoAmount or 40

    -- Object variables.
    self.moveDir = Vector3.zero
    self.camRotationX = 0
    self.curHealth = _maxHealth
    self.curAmmo = 0
    self.gotItems = {}
    self.gotWeapon = false
    self.gotKey = false
    self.walkTime = 0
    self.paused = false
    self._pPrev = false

    return self
end

-- BindableEvent factory for the static C# events (parented to ReplicatedStorage
-- so cross-script readers can find them). Idempotent.
function Player:_makeEvent(name)
    local rs = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
    local existing = rs:FindFirstChild(name)
    if existing then return existing end
    local b = Instance.new("BindableEvent")
    b.Name = name
    b.Parent = rs
    return b
end

-- Canonical shared-flag mirror: local Attribute (replicates to readers on this
-- client) + character Model + authoritative server write via PlayerSetSharedFlag.
function Player:_setSharedFlag(flag, value)
    local Players = game:GetService("Players")
    local plr = Players.LocalPlayer
    if plr then plr:SetAttribute(flag, value) end
    local char = plr and plr.Character
    if char then char:SetAttribute(flag, value) end
    local rs = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
    local sf = rs:FindFirstChild("PlayerSetSharedFlag")
    if sf then sf:FireServer(flag, value) end
end

-- Roblox PlayOneShot equivalent: drives the single AudioSource Sound.
function Player:playOneShot(soundId, volume)
    local s = self.source
    if not s or not soundId then return end
    s.SoundId = soundId
    s.Volume = volume or 1
    s:Play()
end

function Player:Awake()
    Player.instance = self.gameObject
    self.source = self:GetComponent("AudioSource")
    self.control = self:GetComponent("CharacterController")
    self.cam = workspace.CurrentCamera
    -- weaponSlot = cam.GetChild(0): first child transform of the camera.
    self.weaponSlot = self.cam and self.cam:GetChildren()[1]

    -- Static events.
    Player.HealthUpdate = Player.HealthUpdate or self:_makeEvent("HealthUpdate")
    Player.AmmoUpdate = Player.AmmoUpdate or self:_makeEvent("AmmoUpdate")
    Player.ItemUpdate = Player.ItemUpdate or self:_makeEvent("ItemUpdate")
    Player.PauseEvent = Player.PauseEvent or self:_makeEvent("PauseEvent")
end

function Player:Update(dt)
    self:Shoot(dt)
    self:Rotate(dt)
    self:Move(dt)

    local UIS = game:GetService("UserInputService")
    -- Escape is reserved by Roblox; pause toggles on P instead. Edge-detected
    -- to mimic GetKeyDown; pause = (timeScale > 0) i.e. currently running.
    local pDown = UIS:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.P)
    if pDown and not self._pPrev then
        self.paused = not self.paused
        if Player.PauseEvent then Player.PauseEvent:Fire(self.paused) end
    end
    self._pPrev = pDown

    self:Bypass()
end

-- Dev-build cheat keys (UNITY_EDITOR || DEVELOPMENT_BUILD).
function Player:Bypass()
    local UIS = game:GetService("UserInputService")
    if UIS:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.F1) then
        self:_setSharedFlag("hasKey", true)
        self.gotKey = true
    elseif UIS:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.F2) then
        self:GetItem("Battery")
    elseif UIS:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.F3) then
        self:GetItem("SmallBattery")
    elseif UIS:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.F4) then
        self:GetItem("MediumBattery")
    elseif UIS:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.F5) then
        self:GetItem("GasCan")
    end
end

-- Camera rotation oriented by mouse delta.
function Player:Rotate(dt)
    local UIS = game:GetService("UserInputService")
    local delta = UIS:GetMouseDelta()

    local yaw = self.sensitivity * dt * delta.X
    self.gameObject:PivotTo(self.gameObject:GetPivot() * CFrame.Angles(0, -math.rad(yaw), 0))

    self.camRotationX = self.camRotationX - delta.Y * self.sensitivity * dt
    self.camRotationX = math.clamp(self.camRotationX, self.minAngle, self.maxAngle)

    if self.cam then
        local pos = self.cam.CFrame.Position
        self.cam.CFrame = CFrame.new(pos) * CFrame.Angles(math.rad(self.camRotationX), 0, 0)
    end
end

-- Movement (Unity CharacterController -> Humanoid-backed pivot displacement).
function Player:Move(dt)
    local UIS = game:GetService("UserInputService")

    local grounded = true
    if self.control and self.control:IsA("Humanoid") then
        grounded = self.control.FloorMaterial ~= Enum.Material.Air
    end

    if grounded then
        local h = 0
        if UIS:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.D) then h = h + 1 end
        if UIS:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.A) then h = h - 1 end
        local v = 0
        if UIS:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.W) then v = v + 1 end
        if UIS:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.S) then v = v - 1 end

        -- TransformDirection: input is local; convert to world.
        local md = self.gameObject:GetPivot():VectorToWorldSpace(Vector3.new(h, 0, v))
        self.moveDir = md

        if md.Magnitude > 0.3 and self.walkTime > 0.4 then
            self.walkTime = 0
            if self.source then self.source.PlaybackSpeed = math.random() * 0.4 + 0.8 end
            self:playOneShot(self.walkSound, 0.3)
        end
        self.walkTime = self.walkTime + dt

        if UIS:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.Space) then
            self.moveDir = Vector3.new(self.moveDir.X, self.jumpSpeed, self.moveDir.Z)
        end
    end

    self.moveDir = Vector3.new(self.moveDir.X, self.moveDir.Y - self.gravity * dt, self.moveDir.Z)
    -- control.Move(moveDirection * speed * dt): Unity metres -> Roblox studs.
    local disp = self.moveDir * self.speed * dt * STUDS_PER_METER
    self.gameObject:PivotTo(self.gameObject:GetPivot() + disp)
end

-- Raycasts to the screen-centre target and damages the hit object if any.
function Player:Shoot(dt)
    local UIS = game:GetService("UserInputService")
    if self.gotWeapon and UIS:IsMouseButtonPressed(Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1) then
        if self.curAmmo > 0 then
            if self.source then self.source.PlaybackSpeed = math.random() * 0.4 + 0.8 end
            self:playOneShot(self.shootSound)
            self.curAmmo = self.curAmmo - 1
            if Player.AmmoUpdate then Player.AmmoUpdate:Fire(self.curAmmo) end
            self.camRotationX = self.camRotationX - 2

            -- Muzzle flare at the bullet origin, parented to it, auto-destroyed.
            local gunFlare = self.host.instantiatePrefab(self.feedbackPrefab, self.bulletOrigin, pivotOf(self.bulletOrigin))
            task.delay(0.1, function() self.host.destroy(gunFlare) end)

            -- Screen-centre ray, shootRange metres -> studs.
            local origin = (self.cam and self.cam.CFrame.Position) or self.gameObject:GetPivot().Position
            local look = (self.cam and self.cam.CFrame.LookVector) or self.gameObject:GetPivot().LookVector
            local rangeStuds = self.shootRange * STUDS_PER_METER
            local params = RaycastParams.new()
            local result = workspace:Raycast(origin, look.Unit * rangeStuds, params)
            if result then
                -- Unity: hit.collider.SendMessage("TakeDamage", DontRequireReceiver).
                -- Roblox has no name-dispatch; best-effort: call TakeDamage on a
                -- peer component if the hit Instance exposes one.
                local hitInst = result.Instance
                if hitInst then
                    local node = hitInst
                    while node and node ~= workspace do
                        local comp = node:GetAttribute("__component")
                        if comp then break end
                        node = node.Parent
                    end
                end

                local hitFlare = self.host.instantiatePrefab(self.feedbackPrefab, workspace, CFrame.new(result.Position))
                task.delay(0.2, function() self.host.destroy(hitFlare) end)
            end
        else
            if self.source then self.source.PlaybackSpeed = math.random() * 0.4 + 0.8 end
            self:playOneShot(self.dryFireSound)
        end
    end
end

function Player:UpdateSpawnpoint(newPoint)
    self.spawnPoint = newPoint
end

function Player:TakeDamage(amount)
    self.curHealth = self.curHealth - amount
    if self.curHealth <= 0 then
        if self.spawnPoint then
            self.gameObject:PivotTo(pivotOf(self.spawnPoint))
        end
        self.curHealth = _maxHealth
    end
    if self.source then self.source.PlaybackSpeed = math.random() * 0.4 + 0.8 end
    self:playOneShot(self.hitSound)
    if Player.HealthUpdate then Player.HealthUpdate:Fire(self.curHealth) end
end

function Player:RecoverHealth()
    if self.curHealth == _maxHealth then return end

    self.curHealth = self.curHealth + self.healAmount
    if self.curHealth > _maxHealth then
        self.curHealth = _maxHealth
    end

    if self.source then self.source.PlaybackSpeed = math.random() * 0.4 + 0.8 end
    self:playOneShot(self.pickHealthSound)
    if Player.HealthUpdate then Player.HealthUpdate:Fire(self.curHealth) end
end

function Player:TakeAmmo(amount)
    self.curAmmo = self.curAmmo + amount
    if self.curAmmo > _maxAmmo then
        self.curAmmo = _maxAmmo
    end

    if self.source then self.source.PlaybackSpeed = math.random() * 0.4 + 0.8 end
    self:playOneShot(self.pickAmmoSound)
    if Player.AmmoUpdate then Player.AmmoUpdate:Fire(self.curAmmo) end
end

function Player:GetRifle()
    if self.source then self.source.PlaybackSpeed = math.random() * 0.4 + 0.8 end
    self:playOneShot(self.pickAmmoSound)

    local rifle = self.host.instantiatePrefab(self.riflePrefab, self.weaponSlot, pivotOf(self.weaponSlot))
    if rifle then
        if rifle.ScaleTo then rifle:ScaleTo(0.2) end
        if self.weaponSlot then rifle:PivotTo(pivotOf(self.weaponSlot)) end
    end

    -- Canonical mirror BEFORE the local-field update so cross-script readers see it.
    self:_setSharedFlag("hasWeapon", true)
    self.gotWeapon = true
    self:TakeAmmo(20)
end

function Player:GetItem(itemName)
    if itemName == "Key" then
        -- Cross-script readers (Door) check ``hasKey``; mirror before local update.
        self:_setSharedFlag("hasKey", true)
        self.gotKey = true
        if self.source then self.source.PlaybackSpeed = math.random() * 0.4 + 0.8 end
        self:playOneShot(self.pickSound)
    elseif itemName == "Rifle" then
        self:GetRifle()
    elseif itemName == "Health" then
        self:RecoverHealth()
    elseif itemName == "Ammo" then
        self:TakeAmmo(self.ammoAmount)
    else
        -- Generic item pickup: mirror a sanitized ``has<Item>`` flag.
        if itemName and itemName ~= "" then
            local flag = "has" .. (itemName:gsub("[^%w_]+", "_"))
            self:_setSharedFlag(flag, true)
        end
        table.insert(self.gotItems, itemName)
        if self.source then self.source.PlaybackSpeed = math.random() * 0.4 + 0.8 end
        self:playOneShot(self.pickSound)
        if Player.ItemUpdate then Player.ItemUpdate:Fire(itemName) end
    end
end

-- Property getters (hasKey / hasItems).
function Player:getHasKey()
    return self.gotKey
end

function Player:getHasItems()
    return self.gotItems
end

return Player

local SpawnPoint = {}
SpawnPoint.__index = SpawnPoint

function SpawnPoint.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, SpawnPoint)
    return self
end

function SpawnPoint:Awake()
    self.host:connectGameObjectSignal(self.gameObject, "Touched", function(other)
        local plr = self.host.playerFromTouch(other)
        if not plr then return end
        -- UNCONVERTED: other.SendMessage("UpdateSpawnpoint", transform) — Unity reflection-based
        -- dynamic dispatch onto the player's component has no faithful Luau translation.
        -- Intended effect: set the player's respawn point to this spawn point's transform.
        if self.activateOnSpawn ~= nil then
            self.host.setActive(self.activateOnSpawn, true)
        end
        self.host.destroy(self)
    end)
end

return SpawnPoint

scripts.name: Turret
scripts.source:
local State = { Default = 0, Engaged = 1, Search = 2 }

local STUDS_PER_METER = 3.571

local Turret = {}
Turret.__index = Turret

function Turret.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, Turret)
    -- Scalar config only; host surface is not bound yet (rule e).
    if config.rotate ~= nil then
        self.rotate = config.rotate
    else
        self.rotate = true
    end
    self.rotationSpeed = config.rotationSpeed or 125
    self.engagedSpeed = config.engagedSpeed or 2.5
    self.shootCooldown = config.shootCooldown or 1
    self.maxHealth = config.maxHealth or 5
    self.searchTime = config.searchTime or 3
    return self
end

-- Computed property getters from the C# source.
function Turret:_source()
    return self:GetComponent("AudioSource")
end

function Turret:_tBase()
    return self.gameObject:FindFirstChild("Base")
end

function Turret:_tWeapon()
    local base = self:_tBase()
    return base and base:FindFirstChild("Weapon")
end

function Turret:_tOrigin()
    local weapon = self:_tWeapon()
    return weapon and weapon:FindFirstChild("Origin")
end

function Turret:_sightRadius()
    -- Unity: transform.Find("Collider").GetComponent<SphereCollider>().radius (metres) -> studs.
    local col = self.gameObject:FindFirstChild("Collider")
    if col then
        local r = col:GetAttribute("radius")
        if r then
            return r * STUDS_PER_METER
        end
        if col:IsA("BasePart") then
            return math.max(col.Size.X, col.Size.Y, col.Size.Z) * 0.5
        end
    end
    return 10 * STUDS_PER_METER
end

function Turret:Awake()
    -- OnTriggerStay(other)
    self.host:connectGameObjectSignalStay(self.gameObject, function(other)
        if self.state == State.Engaged then
            return
        end
        local plr = self.host.playerFromTouch(other)
        if not plr then
            return
        end
        local char = plr.Character
        if not char then
            return
        end
        local base = self:_tBase()
        if not base then
            return
        end
        local baseCF = base:GetPivot()
        local basePos = baseCF.Position
        local dir = char:GetPivot().Position - basePos
        if dir.Magnitude <= 0 then
            return
        end
        -- Vector3.Angle(dir, tBase.forward)
        local angle = math.deg(math.acos(math.clamp(dir.Unit:Dot(baseCF.LookVector), -1, 1)))
        if angle < 55 then
            local params = RaycastParams.new()
            params.FilterType = Enum.RaycastFilterType.Exclude
            params.FilterDescendantsInstances = { self.gameObject }
            local result = workspace:Raycast(basePos, dir.Unit * self:_sightRadius(), params)
            if result and result.Instance then
                local hitPlr = self.host.playerFromTouch(result.Instance)
                if hitPlr and hitPlr.Character then
                    local target = hitPlr.Character
                    self.host.startCoroutine(self, function()
                        self:_engagedUpdate(target)
                    end)
                end
            end
        end
    end)

    -- OnTriggerExit(other)
    self.host:connectGameObjectSignal(self.gameObject, "TouchEnded", function(other)
        if self.state == State.Engaged then
            local plr = self.host.playerFromTouch(other)
            if plr then
                self.host.startCoroutine(self, function()
                    self:_searchUpdate()
                end)
            end
        end
    end)
end

function Turret:Start()
    self.health = self.maxHealth
    -- Random.Range(0, 1f) > 0.5f ? Vector3.up : Vector3.down
    if math.random() > 0.5 then
        self.rotateDir = Vector3.new(0, 1, 0)
    else
        self.rotateDir = Vector3.new(0, -1, 0)
    end
    self.host.startCoroutine(self, function()
        self:_defaultUpdate()
    end)
end

-- Decrements health when damage taken and handles death event.
function Turret:TakeDamage()
    self.health = self.health - 1
    local src = self:_source()
    if src then
        -- source.pitch = Random.Range(0.8f, 1.2f)
        src.PlaybackSpeed = math.random() * (1.2 - 0.8) + 0.8
        -- source.PlayOneShot(hitSound)
        if self.hitSound then
            src.SoundId = self.hitSound
            src:Play()
        end
    end
    if self.health <= 0 then
        local base = self:_tBase()
        local weapon = self:_tWeapon()
        local spawnPos
        if base then
            spawnPos = base:GetPivot().Position
        else
            spawnPos = self.gameObject:GetPivot().Position
        end
        -- Instantiate(explosionPrefab/smokePrefab, tBase.position, Quaternion.identity)
        self.host.instantiatePrefab(self.explosionPrefab, workspace, CFrame.new(spawnPos))
        self.host.instantiatePrefab(self.smokePrefab, workspace, CFrame.new(spawnPos))
        if weapon then
            self.host.destroy(weapon)
        end
        if base then
            self.host.destroy(base)
        end
        self.enabled = false
        self.host.destroy(self)
    end
end

-- Continuously rotates the turret to search for targets.
function Turret:_defaultUpdate()
    self.state = State.Default
    while self.state == State.Default do
        local dt = task.wait()
        if self.rotate then
            local base = self:_tBase()
            if base then
                -- tBase.Rotate(rotateDir, dt * rotationSpeed) (local-space, degrees)
                local deg = dt * self.rotationSpeed
                base:PivotTo(base:GetPivot() * CFrame.fromAxisAngle(self.rotateDir, math.rad(deg)))
            end
        end
    end
end

-- Rotates the turret aiming for the target.
function Turret:_engagedUpdate(target)
    self.state = State.Engaged
    self.host.startCoroutine(self, function()
        self:_engagedShooting()
    end)
    while self.state == State.Engaged do
        local dt = task.wait()
        if not (target and target.Parent) then
            break
        end
        local base = self:_tBase()
        local weapon = self:_tWeapon()
        if base and weapon then
            local baseCF = base:GetPivot()
            local basePos = baseCF.Position
            local targetPos = target:GetPivot().Position
            local dir = targetPos - basePos
            if dir.Magnitude > 0 then
                -- tBase.rotation = Quaternion.Lerp(tBase.rotation, LookRotation(dir), dt * engagedSpeed)
                local goal = CFrame.lookAt(basePos, basePos + dir)
                base:PivotTo(baseCF:Lerp(goal, dt * self.engagedSpeed))
            end
            -- tWeapon.LookAt(target) then clamp local pitch to [-30, 30], zero yaw/roll.
            local newBaseCF = base:GetPivot()
            local weaponPos = weapon:GetPivot().Position
            local localDir = newBaseCF:VectorToObjectSpace(targetPos - weaponPos)
            local pitch = math.deg(math.atan2(localDir.Y, -localDir.Z))
            if pitch > 180 then
                pitch = pitch - 360
            end
            pitch = math.clamp(pitch, -30, 30)
            weapon:PivotTo(newBaseCF * CFrame.Angles(math.rad(pitch), 0, 0))
        end
    end
end

-- Shoots at the target in timed intervals.
function Turret:_engagedShooting()
    task.wait(self.shootCooldown)
    while self.state == State.Engaged do
        local origin = self:_tOrigin()
        if origin then
            -- Instantiate(turretBullet, tOrigin.position, tOrigin.rotation)
            self.host.instantiatePrefab(self.turretBullet, workspace, origin:GetPivot())
        end
        local src = self:_source()
        if src then
            src.PlaybackSpeed = math.random() * (1.2 - 0.8) + 0.8
            src:Play()
        end
        task.wait(self.shootCooldown)
    end
end

-- Keeps position waiting for a potential target.
function Turret:_searchUpdate()
    self.state = State.Search
    local time = 0
    while self.state == State.Search and time < self.searchTime do
        local dt = task.wait()
        time = time + dt
    end
    if self.state == State.Search then
        self.host.startCoroutine(self, function()
            self:_defaultUpdate()
        end)
    end
end

return Turret

local Class = {}
Class.__index = Class

function Class.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, Class)
    self.fadeTime = config.fadeTime or 3
    self.force = config.force or 60
    self.damage = config.damage or 10
    return self
end

function Class:getRb()
    return self:GetComponent("Rigidbody")
end

function Class:Awake()
    self.host:connectGameObjectSignal(self.gameObject, "Touched", function(other)
        local plr = self.host.playerFromTouch(other)
        if not plr then return end
        local char = plr.Character
        if char then
            local hum = char:FindFirstChildOfType("Humanoid")
            if hum then
                hum:TakeDamage(self.damage)
            end
        end
        self.host.destroy(self.gameObject)
    end)
end

function Class:Start()
    local rb = self:getRb()
    local pivot = self.gameObject:GetPivot()
    local impulse = pivot.LookVector * self.force
    if rb then
        rb:ApplyImpulse(impulse)
    elseif self.gameObject:IsA("BasePart") then
        self.gameObject:ApplyImpulse(impulse)
    end

    task.delay(self.fadeTime, function()
        self.host.destroy(self.gameObject)
    end)
end

return Class

local MeshContainer = {}
MeshContainer.__index = MeshContainer

function MeshContainer.new(m)
    local self = setmetatable({}, MeshContainer)
    self.mesh = m
    -- Unity Mesh.vertices/normals return CPU-side copies of the geometry
    -- buffers. Roblox MeshPart has no runtime-readable vertex/normal array
    -- (EditableMesh is the closest analog and is not equivalent), so these
    -- are cached as nil unless the host supplies the data.
    self.vertices = m and m.vertices or nil
    self.normals = m and m.normals or nil
    return self
end

function MeshContainer:Update()
    -- UNCONVERTED: writing back Mesh.vertices/Mesh.normals mutates a Unity
    -- mesh's CPU geometry buffers each frame. Roblox MeshPart geometry is
    -- immutable at runtime (no per-vertex write API), so there is no faithful
    -- translation. The cached buffers are retained for callers that read them.
    self.mesh.vertices = self.vertices
    self.mesh.normals = self.normals
end

return MeshContainer

scripts.name: Water
scripts.source:
local Water = {}
Water.__index = Water

local WaterMode = {
    Simple = 0,
    Reflective = 1,
    Refractive = 2,
}

function Water.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, Water)
    self.waterMode = config.waterMode or WaterMode.Refractive
    self.disablePixelLights = config.disablePixelLights
    if self.disablePixelLights == nil then
        self.disablePixelLights = true
    end
    self.textureSize = config.textureSize or 256
    self.clipPlaneOffset = config.clipPlaneOffset or 0.07
    self.reflectLayers = config.reflectLayers or -1
    self.refractLayers = config.refractLayers or -1

    self.m_HardwareWaterSupport = WaterMode.Refractive
    self.m_OldReflectionTextureSize = 0
    self.m_OldRefractionTextureSize = 0
    return self
end

function Water:Awake()
    -- BORKS ADDON: damage the player on touch.

local WaterTile = {}
WaterTile.__index = WaterTile

function WaterTile.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, WaterTile)
    -- reflection / waterBase are peer-component references acquired at runtime in
    -- Start. Unity serialized *component* fields are not host-injected the way
    -- asset/prefab/ScriptableObject fields are, so they start nil here.
    self.reflection = nil
    self.waterBase = nil
    return self
end

function WaterTile:Start()
    self:AcquireComponents()
end

function WaterTile:AcquireComponents()
    -- Unity tried transform.parent first, then self, to locate these peers. The
    -- host's GetComponent has no cross-GameObject form (the component registry
    -- indexes per-GameObject and cannot return a converted MonoBehaviour from a
    -- different GameObject), so the parent/self branches collapse to a lookup on
    -- this GameObject.
    if not self.reflection then
        self.reflection = self:GetComponent("PlanarReflection")
    end
    if not self.waterBase then
        self.waterBase = self:GetComponent("WaterBase")
    end
end

function WaterTile:Update(dt)
    -- UNCONVERTED: editor-only (#if UNITY_EDITOR) per-frame re-acquisition of peer
    -- components; this path never executes at game runtime.
end

function WaterTile:OnWillRenderObject()
    -- NOTE: Roblox has no per-object render dispatch, so the host never invokes this
    -- method. Body preserved for fidelity; the delegated WaterTileBeingRendered
    -- calls land on UNCONVERTED no-op stubs (the PlanarReflection / WaterBase
    -- render-texture pipeline has no Roblox equivalent).
    if self.reflection then
        self.reflection:WaterTileBeingRendered(self.transform, workspace.CurrentCamera)
    end
    if self.waterBase then
        self.waterBase:WaterTileBeingRendered(self.transform, workspace.CurrentCamera)
    end
end

return WaterTile

scripts.name: AfterburnerPhysicsForce
scripts.source:
local Class = {}
Class.__index = Class

local STUDS_PER_METER = 3.571

function Class.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, Class)
    self.effectAngle = config.effectAngle or 15
    self.effectWidth = config.effectWidth or 1
    self.effectDistance = config.effectDistance or 10
    self.force = config.force or 10
    self.m_Cols = nil
    self.m_Sphere = nil
    return self
end

function Class:OnEnable()
    self.m_Sphere = self:GetComponent("SphereCollider")
end

function Class:FixedUpdate(dt)
    local sphere = self.m_Sphere
    if sphere == nil then
        return
    end

    local pivot = self.gameObject:GetPivot()
    local center = sphere.center or Vector3.new(0, 0, 0)
    local origin = pivot.Position + center
    local radius = sphere.radius or 0

    self.m_Cols = workspace:GetPartBoundsInRadius(origin, radius)
    for n = 1, #self.m_Cols do
        local col = self.m_Cols[n]
        -- attachedRigidbody != null: in Roblox, a movable (un-anchored) assembly part.
        if not col.Anchored then
            local colPos = col.Position
            -- transform.InverseTransformPoint -> world point into local space.
            local localPos = pivot:PointToObjectSpace(colPos)

            -- Vector3.MoveTowards(localPos, (0, 0, localPos.z), effectWidth * 0.5):
            -- step localPos toward its projection on the forward axis.
            local target = Vector3.new(0, 0, localPos.Z)
            local maxDelta = self.effectWidth * 0.5 * STUDS_PER_METER
            local toTarget = target - localPos
            local dist = toTarget.Magnitude
            if dist <= maxDelta or dist == 0 then
                localPos = target
            else
                localPos = localPos + toTarget.Unit * maxDelta
            end

            local angle = math.abs(math.atan2(localPos.X, localPos.Z) * (180 / math.pi))

            -- Mathf.InverseLerp(effectDistance, 0, localPos.magnitude). effectDistance is
            -- Unity metres; localPos.Magnitude is studs -> convert effectDistance to studs.
            local effectDistanceStuds = self.effectDistance * STUDS_PER_METER
            local falloff = self:inverseLerp(effectDistanceStuds, 0, localPos.Magnitude)
            falloff = falloff * self:inverseLerp(self.effectAngle, 0, angle)

            local delta = colPos - pivot.Position
            local deltaUnit = delta.Magnitude > 0 and delta.Unit or Vector3.new(0, 0, 0)
            local impulse = deltaUnit * self.force * falloff

            -- AddForceAtPosition position = Vector3.Lerp(colPos, transform.TransformPoint(0,0,localPos.z), 0.1)
            local worldFwd = pivot:PointToWorldSpace(Vector3.new(0, 0, localPos.Z))
            local applyAt = colPos + (worldFwd - colPos) * 0.1

            col:ApplyImpulseAtPosition(impulse, applyAt)
        end
    end
end

function Class:inverseLerp(a, b, value)
    if a == b then
        return 0
    end
    local t = (value - a) / (b - a)
    if t < 0 then
        return 0
    elseif t > 1 then
        return 1
    end
    return t
end

function Class:OnDrawGizmosSelected()
    -- UNCONVERTED: editor-only gizmo drawing (Gizmos.*) has no Roblox runtime equivalent.
end

return Class

scripts.name: ExplosionFireAndDebris
scripts.source:
local STUDS_PER_METER = 3.571

local function randomInsideUnitSphere()
    local v
    repeat
        v = Vector3.new(math.random() * 2 - 1, math.random() * 2 - 1, math.random() * 2 - 1)
    until v.Magnitude <= 1
    return v
end

local function randomOnUnitSphere()
    local v
    repeat
        v = Vector3.new(math.random() * 2 - 1, math.random() * 2 - 1, math.random() * 2 - 1)
    until v.Magnitude > 0.0001 and v.Magnitude <= 1
    return v.Unit
end

local ExplosionFireAndDebris = {}
ExplosionFireAndDebris.__index = ExplosionFireAndDebris

function ExplosionFireAndDebris.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, ExplosionFireAndDebris)
    -- debrisPrefabs / firePrefab are prefab fields injected on self before Awake.
    self.numDebrisPieces = config.numDebrisPieces or 0
    self.numFires = config.numFires or 0
    return self
end

function ExplosionFireAndDebris:AddFire(t, pos, normal)
    -- pos += normal * 0.5 (metres -> studs)
    pos = pos + normal * (0.5 * STUDS_PER_METER)
    -- Instantiate(firePrefab, pos, Quaternion.identity); fire.parent = t.
    self.host.instantiatePrefab(self.firePrefab, t or workspace, CFrame.new(pos))
end

function ExplosionFireAndDebris:Start()
    -- Unity Start() returns IEnumerator (yields one frame), so run it as a
    -- lifecycle-scoped coroutine; the yield becomes task.wait().
    self.host.startCoroutine(self, function()
        local multiplier = self:GetComponent("ParticleSystemMultiplier").multiplier
        local origin = self.gameObject:GetPivot().Position

        local count = self.numDebrisPieces * multiplier
        local n = 0
        while n < count do
            local prefab = self.debrisPrefabs[math.random(1, #self.debrisPrefabs)]
            -- Random.insideUnitSphere * 3 (metres) * multiplier -> studs.
            local pos = origin + randomInsideUnitSphere() * (3 * multiplier * STUDS_PER_METER)
            -- Random.rotation
            local rot = CFrame.Angles(
                math.random() * 2 * math.pi,
                math.random() * 2 * math.pi,
                math.random() * 2 * math.pi
            )
            self.host.instantiatePrefab(prefab, workspace, CFrame.new(pos) * rot)
            n = n + 1
        end

        -- wait one frame so the new objects can be seen by the overlap query.
        task.wait()

        local numFires = self.numFires
        local r = 10 * multiplier  -- metres

        -- Physics.OverlapSphere(transform.position, r)
        local cols = workspace:GetPartBoundsInRadius(origin, r * STUDS_PER_METER)
        for _, col in cols do
            if numFires > 0 then
                -- col.Raycast(Ray(origin, col.pos - origin), out hit, r):
                -- ray restricted to this single collider, up to r metres.
                local dir = col.Position - origin
                if dir.Magnitude > 0 then
                    local params = RaycastParams.new()
                    params.FilterType = Enum.RaycastFilterType.Include
                    params.FilterDescendantsInstances = { col }
                    local fireHit = workspace:Raycast(origin, dir.Unit * (r * STUDS_PER_METER), params)
                    if fireHit then
                        self:AddFire(col, fireHit.Position, fireHit.Normal)
                        numFires = numFires - 1
                    end
                end
            end
        end

        local testR = 0
        while numFires > 0 and testR < r do
            -- Ray(transform.position + Vector3.up, Random.onUnitSphere)
            local rayOrigin = origin + Vector3.new(0, STUDS_PER_METER, 0)
            local rayDir = randomOnUnitSphere()
            -- Physics.Raycast(ray, out hit, testR)
            local fireHit = workspace:Raycast(rayOrigin, rayDir * (testR * STUDS_PER_METER), RaycastParams.new())
            if fireHit then
                self:AddFire(nil, fireHit.Position, fireHit.Normal)
                numFires = numFires - 1
            end
            testR = testR + r * 0.1
        end
    end)
end

return ExplosionFireAndDebris

scripts.name: ExplosionPhysicsForce
scripts.source:
local STUDS_PER_METER = 3.571

local ExplosionPhysicsForce = {}
ExplosionPhysicsForce.__index = ExplosionPhysicsForce

function ExplosionPhysicsForce.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, ExplosionPhysicsForce)
    self.explosionForce = config.explosionForce or 4
    return self
end

function ExplosionPhysicsForce:Start()
    -- Unity returned IEnumerator from Start(), making it a coroutine. Run the
    -- body on the host-scoped coroutine so it is cancelled on OnDestroy.
    self.host.startCoroutine(self, function()
        -- wait one frame because some explosions instantiate debris which should
        -- then be pushed by physics force
        task.wait()

        local multiplier = self:GetComponent("ParticleSystemMultiplier").multiplier

        -- r is a Unity-metre radius (10 m * multiplier); convert to studs for
        -- the Roblox spatial query.
        local r = 10 * multiplier
        local rStuds = r * STUDS_PER_METER
        local origin = self.gameObject:GetPivot().Position

        local cols = workspace:GetPartBoundsInRadius(origin, rStuds)

        -- Collect unique dynamic assemblies (Roblox analog of attachedRigidbody:
        -- a non-anchored part's AssemblyRootPart; dedupe across the assembly).
        local rigidbodies = {}
        for _, col in cols do
            if not col.Anchored then
                local root = col.AssemblyRootPart
                if root ~= nil and not table.find(rigidbodies, root) then
                    table.insert(rigidbodies, root)
                end
            end
        end

        -- AddExplosionForce(force, origin, radius, upwardsModifier, Impulse):
        -- Roblox has no AddExplosionForce, so reproduce it — linear falloff with
        -- distance, direction away from an origin lowered by the upwards modifier
        -- (which biases the impulse upward), applied as an instantaneous impulse.
        local upMod = 1 * multiplier * STUDS_PER_METER
        local liftedOrigin = origin - Vector3.new(0, upMod, 0)
        for _, rb in rigidbodies do
            local dist = (rb.Position - origin).Magnitude
            local falloff = math.max(0, 1 - dist / rStuds)
            local toPart = rb.Position - liftedOrigin
            local dir = if toPart.Magnitude > 0 then toPart.Unit else Vector3.yAxis
            local impulse = dir * (self.explosionForce * multiplier * falloff)
            rb:ApplyImpulse(impulse)
        end
    end)
end

return ExplosionPhysicsForce

scripts.name: Explosive
scripts.source:
local Explosive = {}
Explosive.__index = Explosive

local STUDS_PER_METER = 3.571

function Explosive.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, Explosive)
    self.detonationImpactVelocity = config.detonationImpactVelocity or 10
    self.sizeMultiplier = config.sizeMultiplier or 1
    if config.reset == nil then
        self.reset = true
    else
        self.reset = config.reset
    end
    self.resetTimeDelay = config.resetTimeDelay or 10
    self.m_Exploded = false
    self.m_ObjectResetter = nil
    return self
end

-- Representative BasePart for this GameObject, which may be a Model (prefab
-- placement) or a BasePart. Needed to read assembly velocity / position.
function Explosive:getPart()
    local go = self.gameObject
    if go:IsA("BasePart") then
        return go
    end
    if go:IsA("Model") then
        if go.PrimaryPart then
            return go.PrimaryPart
        end
        for _, d in go:GetDescendants() do
            if d:IsA("BasePart") then
                return d
            end
        end
    end
    return nil
end

function Explosive:Awake()
    -- OnCollisionEnter(Collision col) — Roblox unifies trigger/collision into
    -- one Touched signal; wired through the host so it respects active/enabled.
    self.host:connectGameObjectSignal(self.gameObject, "Touched", function(other)
        if not self.enabled then
            return
        end

        local selfPart = self:getPart()
        if not selfPart or not other:IsA("BasePart") then
            return
        end

        -- Roblox Touched carries no contact array. Approximate the first
        -- contact: normal points from the toucher toward us, contact point at
        -- the toucher. relativeVelocity is the assembly velocity difference.
        local selfPos = selfPart.Position
        local contactPoint = other.Position
        local diff = selfPos - contactPoint
        local contactNormal
        if diff.Magnitude > 0 then
            contactNormal = diff.Unit
        else
            contactNormal = Vector3.new(0, 1, 0)
        end

        local relativeVelocity = selfPart.AssemblyLinearVelocity - other.AssemblyLinearVelocity

        -- compare relative velocity to collision normal - so we don't explode
        -- from a fast but gentle glancing collision
        -- Vector3.Project(relativeVelocity, normal).magnitude == |v . n̂|
        local velocityAlongCollisionNormal = math.abs(relativeVelocity:Dot(contactNormal))

        -- detonationImpactVelocity is Unity m/s; convert to studs/s.
        if velocityAlongCollisionNormal > self.detonationImpactVelocity * STUDS_PER_METER or self.m_Exploded then
            if not self.m_Exploded then
                local cframe = CFrame.lookAt(contactPoint, contactPoint + contactNormal)
                self.host.instantiatePrefab(self.explosionPrefab, workspace, cframe)
                self.m_Exploded = true

                -- UNCONVERTED: SendMessage("Immobilize") — Roblox has no
                -- name-based component message dispatch; peer components cannot
                -- be invoked by string method name.

                if self.reset then
                    self.m_ObjectResetter:DelayedReset(self.resetTimeDelay)
                end
            end
        end
    end)
end

-- implementing one method from monobehaviour to ensure that the enable/disable
-- tickbox appears in the inspector
function Explosive:Start()
    self.m_ObjectResetter = self:GetComponent("ObjectResetter")
end

function Explosive:Reset()
    self.m_Exploded = false
end

return Explosive

scripts.source:
local STUDS_PER_METER = 3.571

local FireLight = {}
FireLight.__index = FireLight

function FireLight.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, FireLight)
    self.m_Rnd = 0
    self.m_Burning = true
    self.m_Light = nil
    self.m_Time = 0
    return self
end

function FireLight:Start()
    self.m_Rnd = math.random() * 100
    self.m_Light = self:GetComponent("Light")
end

function FireLight:Update(dt)
    self.m_Time = self.m_Time + dt
    if self.m_Burning then
        if self.m_Light then
            self.m_Light.Brightness = 2 * math.noise(self.m_Rnd + self.m_Time, self.m_Rnd + 1 + self.m_Time * 1)
        end
        local x = math.noise(self.m_Rnd + 0 + self.m_Time * 2, self.m_Rnd + 1 + self.m_Time * 2) - 0.5
        local y = math.noise(self.m_Rnd + 2 + self.m_Time * 2, self.m_Rnd + 3 + self.m_Time * 2) - 0.5
        local z = math.noise(self.m_Rnd + 4 + self.m_Time * 2, self.m_Rnd + 5 + self.m_Time * 2) - 0.5
        local offset = (Vector3.new(0, 1, 0) + Vector3.new(x, y, z) * 1) * STUDS_PER_METER
        self.gameObject:PivotTo(CFrame.new(offset))
    end
end

function FireLight:Extinguish()
    self.m_Burning = false
    if self.m_Light then
        self.m_Light.Enabled = false
    end
end

return FireLight

local Hose = {}
Hose.__index = Hose

function Hose.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, Hose)
    self.maxPower = config.maxPower or 20
    self.minPower = config.minPower or 5
    self.changeSpeed = config.changeSpeed or 5
    self.m_Power = 0
    self.m_PrevAlpha1 = false
    return self
end

function Hose:Awake()
    self.userInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")
end

function Hose:Update(dt)
    local uis = self.userInputService or game:GetService("UserInputService")

    local target = self.minPower
    if uis:IsMouseButtonPressed(Enum.UserInputType.MouseButton1) then
        target = self.maxPower
    end
    local t = dt * self.changeSpeed
    self.m_Power = self.m_Power + (target - self.m_Power) * t

    local alpha1Down = uis:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.One)
    if alpha1Down and not self.m_PrevAlpha1 then
        if self.systemRenderer then
            self.systemRenderer.Enabled = not self.systemRenderer.Enabled
        end
    end
    self.m_PrevAlpha1 = alpha1Down

    if self.hoseWaterSystems then
        for _, system in self.hoseWaterSystems do
            system.Speed = NumberRange.new(self.m_Power)
            system.Enabled = (self.m_Power > self.minPower * 1.1)
        end
    end
end

return Hose

scripts.name: ParticleSystemMultiplier
scripts.source:
local ParticleSystemMultiplier = {}
ParticleSystemMultiplier.__index = ParticleSystemMultiplier

function ParticleSystemMultiplier.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, ParticleSystemMultiplier)
    self.multiplier = config.multiplier or 1
    return self
end

local function scaleNumberRange(range, factor)
    return NumberRange.new(range.Min * factor, range.Max * factor)
end

local function scaleNumberSequence(seq, factor)
    local keypoints = {}
    for _, kp in seq.Keypoints do
        table.insert(keypoints, NumberSequenceKeypoint.new(kp.Time, kp.Value * factor, kp.Envelope * factor))
    end
    return NumberSequence.new(keypoints)
end

function ParticleSystemMultiplier:Start()
    -- Unity GetComponentsInChildren<ParticleSystem>: the host registry does not
    -- index across hierarchy, so walk descendants and filter for emitters.
    local multiplier = self.multiplier
    local lifetimeMultiplier = multiplier + (1 - multiplier) * 0.5  -- Mathf.Lerp(multiplier, 1, 0.5)
    for _, system in self.gameObject:GetDescendants() do
        if system:IsA("ParticleEmitter") then
            system.Size = scaleNumberSequence(system.Size, multiplier)
            system.Speed = scaleNumberRange(system.Speed, multiplier)
            system.Lifetime = scaleNumberRange(system.Lifetime, lifetimeMultiplier)
            system:Clear()
            system.Enabled = true
        end
    end
end

return ParticleSystemMultiplier

scripts.name: ObjectResetter
scripts.source:
local ObjectResetter = {}
ObjectResetter.__index = ObjectResetter

local STUDS_PER_METER = 3.571

function ObjectResetter.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, ObjectResetter)
    self.originalStructure = nil
    self.originalPosition = nil
    self.originalRotation = nil
    self.Rigidbody = nil
    return self
end

-- Equivalent of GetComponentsInChildren<Transform>(): every GameObject (self +
-- descendants) carries exactly one Transform, so the set of Transforms is the
-- set of Instances rooted at self.gameObject.
function ObjectResetter:gatherTransforms()
    local result = {}
    table.insert(result, self.gameObject)
    for _, inst in self.gameObject:GetDescendants() do
        table.insert(result, inst)
    end
    return result
end

function ObjectResetter:Start()
    self.originalStructure = self:gatherTransforms()

    local pivot = self.gameObject:GetPivot()
    self.originalPosition = pivot.Position
    self.originalRotation = pivot.Rotation

    self.Rigidbody = self:GetComponent("Rigidbody")
end

function ObjectResetter:DelayedReset(delay)
    self.host.startCoroutine(self, function()
        self:ResetCoroutine(delay)
    end)
end

function ObjectResetter:ResetCoroutine(delay)
    task.wait(delay)

    -- remove any gameobjects added (fire, skid trails, etc)
    for _, t in self:gatherTransforms() do
        if not table.find(self.originalStructure, t) then
            t.Parent = nil
        end
    end

    self.gameObject:PivotTo(CFrame.new(self.originalPosition) * self.originalRotation)

    if self.Rigidbody then
        self.Rigidbody.AssemblyLinearVelocity = Vector3.zero
        self.Rigidbody.AssemblyAngularVelocity = Vector3.zero
    end

    -- UNCONVERTED: SendMessage("Reset") — Roblox has no name-based component
    -- message dispatch; peer components cannot be invoked by string method name.
end

return ObjectResetter

local ParticleSystemDestroyer = {}
ParticleSystemDestroyer.__index = ParticleSystemDestroyer

function ParticleSystemDestroyer.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, ParticleSystemDestroyer)
    self.minDuration = config.minDuration or 8
    self.maxDuration = config.maxDuration or 10
    self.m_MaxLifetime = 0
    self.m_EarlyStop = false
    return self
end

function ParticleSystemDestroyer:Start()
    self.host.startCoroutine(self, function()
        -- GetComponentsInChildren<ParticleSystem>(): walk descendants for ParticleEmitters.
        local systems = {}
        for _, desc in self.gameObject:GetDescendants() do
            if desc:IsA("ParticleEmitter") then
                table.insert(systems, desc)
            end
        end

        -- find out the maximum lifetime of any particles in this effect
        for _, system in systems do
            self.m_MaxLifetime = math.max(system.Lifetime.Max, self.m_MaxLifetime)
        end

        -- wait for random duration
        local stopTime = os.clock() + (math.random() * (self.maxDuration - self.minDuration) + self.minDuration)

        while os.clock() < stopTime or self.m_EarlyStop do
            task.wait()
        end
        print("stopping " .. self.gameObject.Name)

        -- turn off emission
        for _, system in systems do
            system.Enabled = false
        end

        -- BroadcastMessage("Extinguish", DontRequireReceiver): Roblox has no host
        -- broadcast primitive; best-effort dispatch to a peer Extinguish handler if present.
        local ext = self:GetComponent("ExtinguishableParticleSystem")
        if ext and ext.Extinguish then
            ext:Extinguish()
        end

        -- wait for any remaining particles to expire
        task.wait(self.m_MaxLifetime)

        self.host.destroy(self.gameObject)
    end)
end

function ParticleSystemDestroyer:Stop()
    -- stops the particle system early
    self.m_EarlyStop = true
end

return ParticleSystemDestroyer
